rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs (photo-text content similarity, processing ease, review helpfulness in Yelp reviews) and the cited paper’s core constructs (brand selfie taxonomy, sender vs. brand engagement, self-reference) overlap only at a broad “UGC visuals” level based on the notes. Because the matched evidence is only a DOI reference with no in-text citation context, there is insufficient evidence to confidently treat this as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
